mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT sr.customer_id, sr.dept_id FROM t_stock_record sr WHERE GROUP BY sr.customer_id, sr.dept_id ) summary

SELECT sr.customer_id AS customerId, MAX(sr.customer_name) AS customerName, sr.dept_id AS deptId, MAX(sr.dept_code) AS groupCode, COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(sr.goods_id, ':', COALESCE(sr.sku_id, 0))) AS goodsKinds, SUM(sr.change_qty) AS totalQuantity, MAX(sr.biz_date) AS lastOutboundDate FROM t_stock_record sr WHERE GROUP BY sr.customer_id, sr.dept_id ORDER BY lastOutboundDate DESC, customerId DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT o.customer_id, i.category_id, CASE WHEN i.category_id IS NULL THEN i.goods_id ELSE 0 END AS uncategorized_goods_id FROM t_stock_order o INNER JOIN t_stock_order_item i ON i.order_id = o.id WHERE GROUP BY o.customer_id, i.category_id, CASE WHEN i.category_id IS NULL THEN i.goods_id ELSE 0 END ) goods_summary

SELECT o.customer_id AS customerId, MAX(o.customer_name) AS customerName, CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT o.outbound_mode) = 1 AND MAX(o.outbound_mode) = 'GROUP_CUSTOMER' AND COUNT(DISTINCT o.dept_id) = 1 THEN MAX(o.dept_id) ELSE NULL END AS deptId, CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT o.outbound_mode) = 1 AND MAX(o.outbound_mode) = 'GROUP_CUSTOMER' AND COUNT(DISTINCT o.dept_code) = 1 THEN MAX(o.dept_code) ELSE NULL END AS groupCode, i.category_id AS categoryId, COALESCE(MAX(i.category_name), '未分類') AS categoryName, CASE WHEN i.category_id IS NULL THEN MAX(i.goods_id) ELSE NULL END AS goodsId, CASE WHEN i.category_id IS NULL THEN MAX(i.goods_name) ELSE NULL END AS goodsName, NULL AS skuId, NULL AS skuCode, NULL AS stockTypeId, NULL AS stockTypeName, COUNT(DISTINCT i.goods_id) AS goodsCount, COUNT(DISTINCT i.sku_id) AS skuCount, SUM(ABS(i.before_qty - i.after_qty)) AS quantity, 2 AS status, '出庫完了' AS statusDesc, CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT o.outbound_mode) > 1 THEN 'MIXED' WHEN MAX(o.outbound_mode) = 'CUSTOMER' THEN 'SELF' WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT o.dept_code) = 1 THEN CONCAT('GROUP:', MAX(o.dept_code)) ELSE 'GROUP' END AS sourceScope, MAX(COALESCE(i.biz_date, o.biz_date)) AS lastOutboundDate FROM t_stock_order o INNER JOIN t_stock_order_item i ON i.order_id = o.id WHERE GROUP BY o.customer_id, i.category_id, CASE WHEN i.category_id IS NULL THEN i.goods_id ELSE 0 END ORDER BY lastOutboundDate DESC, categoryId DESC, goodsId DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_stock_order o INNER JOIN t_stock_order_item i ON i.order_id = o.id WHERE

SELECT i.id AS recordId, o.order_no AS bizNo, o.id AS orderId, i.id AS orderItemId, o.customer_id AS customerId, o.customer_name AS customerName, o.dept_id AS deptId, o.dept_code AS groupCode, i.goods_id AS goodsId, i.goods_name AS goodsName, i.sku_id AS skuId, i.sku_code AS skuCode, i.stock_type_id AS stockTypeId, i.stock_type_name AS stockTypeName, ABS(i.before_qty - i.after_qty) AS quantity, COALESCE(i.biz_date, o.biz_date) AS outboundDate, o.operator_id AS operatorId, o.operator_name AS operatorName FROM t_stock_order o INNER JOIN t_stock_order_item i ON i.order_id = o.id WHERE ORDER BY COALESCE(i.biz_date, o.biz_date) DESC, i.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT i.goods_id) FROM t_stock_order o INNER JOIN t_stock_order_item i ON i.order_id = o.id WHERE

SELECT o.customer_id AS customerId, MAX(o.customer_name) AS customerName FROM t_stock_order o INNER JOIN t_stock_order_item i ON i.order_id = o.id WHERE GROUP BY o.customer_id ORDER BY customerName ASC, customerId ASC

SELECT i.goods_id AS goodsId, MAX(i.goods_name) AS goodsName, MAX(i.category_id) AS categoryId, MAX(i.category_name) AS categoryName, SUM(ABS(i.before_qty - i.after_qty)) AS totalQuantity FROM t_stock_order o INNER JOIN t_stock_order_item i ON i.order_id = o.id WHERE GROUP BY i.goods_id ORDER BY goodsName ASC, goodsId ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(c.country), ''), '未設定') AS country FROM t_stock_order o INNER JOIN t_stock_order_item i ON i.order_id = o.id LEFT JOIN t_customer c ON c.id = o.customer_id AND c.deleted = 0 WHERE GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(c.country), ''), '未設定') ) country_summary

SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(c.country), ''), '未設定') AS country FROM t_stock_order o INNER JOIN t_stock_order_item i ON i.order_id = o.id LEFT JOIN t_customer c ON c.id = o.customer_id AND c.deleted = 0 WHERE GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(c.country), ''), '未設定') ORDER BY country ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
